case.title: CARNEGIE STEEL CO v. CAMBRIA IRON CO

opinion.h1: CARNEGIE STEEL CO v. CAMBRIA IRON CO, 175 U.S. 727 (1899)
opinion.h2: CARNEGIE STEEL COMPANY (LIMITED), Petitioner, v. CAMBRIA IRON COMPANY. No. 427.

f.p: See 37 C. C. A. 593, 96 Fed. Rep. 850.[ Carnegie Steel Co v. Cambria Iron Co 175 U.S. 727 (1899) ]
